key_evidence: Magyar pushing back on EU pension and tax reform conditionalities (Euronews May 22) — implementation before August deadline 'practically impossible'
20+ EC experts in Budapest through Friday for rule-of-law reform talks — broader reform program continues
Rule-of-law dimension (primary May 21 upgrade driver) remains intact
May 27 EU funds reform-plan submission milestone remains live and falsifiable
Sulyok dismissal compliance deadline May 31 remains active
methodology_novel: Reforms-contested-not-abandoned pattern: government pushes back on specific reform conditionalities while maintaining commitment to broader reform program. Sub-case of the May 21 reforms-announced-not-enacted anchoring. Hold is appropriate; no downgrade unless reforms formally withdrawn or May 27/May 31 deadlines pass un-met.
